programme.desc: Chicago Stars FC battle Portland Thorns FC in an NWSL match at Northwestern Medicine Field. Portland holds a 3-1-1 advantage over the last five meetings after playing Chicago to a hard-fought 1-1 draw during their previous clash in September 2025.

programme.title: NASCAR Cup Series
programme.desc: The Cup Series visits the 1.5-mile Texas oval. Denny Hamlin looks to secure his third victory of the season. Following a top-5 finish at Talladega, Alex Bowman seeks to navigate the high banks of turns 1 and 2 to reach the winner's circle.

programme.title: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: The Detroit Tigers host the Texas Rangers to conclude a three-game series at Comerica Park. Josh Jung leads Texas with a .317 batting average against Detroit's Kevin McGonigle with an average of .333. Jack Leiter is the projected starter for Texas.
